description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with an automation stage containing a job named auto_build:timer. The job extends the .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens templates, uses the resource_group auto-build-timer, and runs only when the CI variable AUTO_BUILD_TIMER is set to "true" (when: always). In the script it executes `bundle exec rake 'auto_build:timer'`. No specific Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used. Ensure the job is placed in the automation stage.
